claims: Validated O(n) AABB computation and visualization in existing include/AABBDraw.h.
Integrated AABB test into src/sketch.cpp using SOP Step 9 switchboard.
Verified build with LLVM/Ninja and verified headless capture output.
AABB Min/Max correctly computed: Min(-20, -20, -10) Max(20, 20, 10).
optimization_metrics: AABB computation is O(n) with zero heap allocations. Draw loop uses direct V3 iteration.
